prerequisites: A Greenhouse Recruiting account with access to the Dev Center.
A user with the "can manage ALL organization's API credentials" permission, required to create Harvest API credentials.
A Harvest API key (api_key) generated in the Greenhouse Dev Center.
Endpoint permissions assigned to the API key covering the data this source needs to read.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic Auth)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a single Greenhouse Harvest API key, supplied via the connector's `api_key` field. Greenhouse uses HTTP Basic Authentication over HTTPS where the API key is the username and the password is left blank.

setupSteps.title: Open the Dev Center in Greenhouse
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Greenhouse Recruiting as a user who can manage all of the organization's API credentials. Click the Configure (gear) icon in the navigation bar, then select Dev Center from the left menu and click API Credential Management.

setupSteps.title: Create new Harvest API credentials
setupSteps.body: Click "Create new API credentials." For API type choose Harvest, select the partner or vendor (or "unlisted vendor"/"custom"), and enter a description that identifies this integration. Copy and securely store the generated API key, then confirm you have stored it.

setupSteps.title: Assign endpoint permissions
setupSteps.body: Click "Manage permissions" and grant access to the specific Harvest endpoints this source needs to read. Enable only the endpoints required and click Save.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the generated key in the required `api_key` field. Optionally set `num_workers` to control the number of concurrent workers used when syncing.

sources.title: Create Harvest API credentials for an integration - Greenhouse Support
